heading: Return of partnership income
label: 6031 Return of partnership income

Amendments2018—Subsec. (b). substituted “Information required to be furnished by the partnership under this subsection may not be amended after the due date of the return under subsection (a) to which such information relates, except—” for “Except as provided in the procedures under section 6225(c), with respect to statements under section 6226, or as otherwise provided by the Secretary, information required to be furnished by the partnership under this subsection may not be amended after the due date of the return under subsection (a) to which such information relates.” and added pars. (b). substituted “Except as provided in the procedures under section 6225(c), with respect to statements under section 6226, or as otherwise provided by the Secretary, information required to be furnished by the partnership under this subsection may not be amended after the due date of the return under subsection (a) to which such information relates.” for “In the case of an electing large partnership (as defined in section 775), such information shall be furnished on or before the first March 15 following the close of such taxable year.”Pub. Returns Required From All Partnerships With United States Partners, , , as amended by , , , provided that:Pub. L. 97–248, title IV, § 40496 Stat. 669Pub. L. 99–514, § 2100 Stat. 2095Sept. 3, 1982Oct. 22, 1986“Except as hereafter provided in regulations prescribed by the Secretary of the Treasury or his delegate, nothing in section 6031 of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 [formerly I.R.C. 1954] shall be treated as excluding any partnership from the filing requirements of such section for any taxable year if the income tax liability under subtitle A of such Code of any United States person is determined in whole or in part by taking into account (directly or indirectly) partnership items of such partnership for such taxable year.”

children.heading: General rule
children.label: a General rule
children.text: Every partnership (as defined in section 761(a)) shall make a return for each taxable year, stating specifically the items of its gross income and the deductions allowable by subtitle A, and such other information, for the purpose of carrying out the provisions of subtitle A as the Secretary may by forms and regulations prescribe, and shall include in the return the names and addresses of the individuals who would be entitled to share in the taxable income if distributed and the amount of the distributive share of each individual.
in the case of a partnership which has elected the application of section 6221(b) for the taxable year,
as provided in the procedures under section 6225(c),
with respect to statements under section 6226, or
as otherwise provided by the Secretary.

shall furnish to the partnership, in the manner prescribed by the Secretary, the name and address of such other person, and any other information for such taxable year as the Secretary may by form and regulation prescribe, and
shall furnish in the manner prescribed by the Secretary such other person the information provided by such partnership under subsection (b).

children.heading: Separate statement of items of unrelated business taxable income
children.label: d Separate statement of items of unrelated business taxable income
children.text: In the case of any partnership regularly carrying on a trade or business (within the meaning of section 512(c)(1)), the information required under subsection (b) to be furnished to its partners shall include such information as is necessary to enable each partner to compute its distributive share of partnership income or loss from such trade or business in accordance with section 512(a)(1), but without regard to the modifications described in paragraphs (8) through (15) of section 512(b).

children.heading: Exception for foreign partnership
children.label: 1 Exception for foreign partnership
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2), the preceding provisions of this section shall not apply to a foreign partnership.

children.heading: Certain foreign partnerships required to file return
children.label: 2 Certain foreign partnerships required to file return
A
children.text: gross income derived from sources within the United States, or

children.label: B
children.text: gross income which is effectively connected with the conduct of a trade or business within the United States.

children.heading: Electing investment partnerships
children.label: f Electing investment partnerships
children.text: In the case of any electing investment partnership (as defined in section 743(e)(6)), the information required under subsection (b) to be furnished to any partner to whom section 743(e)(2) applies shall include such information as is necessary to enable the partner to compute the amount of losses disallowed under section 743(e).1See References in Text note below.1
